perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young female creator wearing a blue beret and white vest stands in a warehouse-style supermarket, holding a purple Ora2 toothpaste variety pack and speaking excitedly to the camera. (2) She points to the box's flavor illustrations as the camera zooms slightly. (3) An off-screen male's hand enters the frame to point at a specific part of the product packaging while the woman continues her explanation. (4) She gives a thumbs-up gesture and points at the price tag visible on the shelf behind her, concluding with a celebratory expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music begins immediately as a female voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone. (2) The female voice continues her rapid explanation until a deeper male voice interjects with a brief question off-camera. (3) The female voice responds immediately, maintaining the energetic pace. (4) The background music remains constant throughout, fading out only at the very end as the speech concludes with a recommendation phrase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '現在好事多有' (Functional: Currently available at Costco). (2) '跟日本一樣便宜' (Hook: As cheap as in Japan). (3) 'Ora2' (Functional: Brand name). (4) '五條 399 元' (Functional: Price information, 5 pieces for 399 NTD). (5) '超划算!' (Effect: Super value!). (6) '推推' (Effect: Recommended).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Breakdown -> Price Comparison -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 male hand/arm pointing at the product box
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue 'Kangol' brand beret and a light-colored puffer vest over a blue shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Large industrial shelving units stacked with consumer goods, specifically personal hygiene products like Sensodyne toothpaste.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Price/Location Context -> Detailed Product Content -> Final Endorsement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a consumer guide and product endorsement for a specific Ora2 toothpaste variety pack sold at Costco. By comparing the local warehouse price to prices in Japan, the creator establishes a value proposition to encourage viewers to purchase the item immediately while it is in stock.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the product, detailed price analysis, and thumbs-up visual cues.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and rapid price comparison logic common in Asian shopping vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a 'discovery' narrative where the influencer finds a bargain in a well-known retail chain, leveraging the 'Costco find' trend.
